description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/api.py to add a str annotation to create_user's name parameter, the only missing annotation on a public top-level function. _internal_helper stays unannotated (private, out of scope), so check_types.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_types.py: 1 violation — 'create_user' (line 13): parameter 'name' has no type annotation. Based on how 'name' is used (assigned directly into the returned dict as a string field alongside email: str), the correct annotation is str. Adding it. Not touching the checker or the private _internal_helper.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_types.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
